aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Zigbee Light Sensor ZG-106Z**
   - **User:** johnx1971
   - **Existing Fingerprints:** 
     - `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (Driver: `climate_sensor`)
   - **Issue Link:** [#165](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/165)

2. **BSEED 2 Button Wallswitch Zigbee with Neutral**
   - **User:** pjmpessers
   - **Existing Fingerprints:**
     - `_TZ3000_l9brjwau` (Driver: `switch_2gang`)
     - `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` (Drivers: `switch_3gang`, `switch_4gang`)
   - **Issue Link:** [#1337](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1337)

## Supported Fingerprints
- **Existing Fingerprints:**
  - `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (climate_sensor)
  - `_TZ3000_l9brjwau` (switch_2gang)
  - `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` (switch_3gang, switch_4gang)

## Fork Fingerprints to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices**
   - **User:** Robsta86
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_sxm7l9xa`, `_TZE204_qasjif9e`
   - **Status:** Closed
   - **PR Link:** [#180](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180)

2. **Added TS110E Driver**
   - **User:** PiTRiS87
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **PR Link:** [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)

3. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202**
   - **User:** chernals
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`
   - **Status:** Closed
   - **PR Link:** [#1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)

4. **Added 3 New Devices**
   - **User:** Peter-Celica
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **PR Link:** [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)

5. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **User:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **PR Link:** [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)

6. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **User:** Melectro1
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **PR Link:** [#1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)

7. **Add `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` - Update app.json**
   - **User:** YuriEstevan
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`
   - **Status:** Open
   - **PR Link:** [#1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, highlighting new device requests, supported fingerprints, and significant pull requests. For further details, please refer to the respective links.
